hero.title:
Don't act alone.

Let's be superheroes

together.
hero.subtitle: Find climate and sustainability projects that need your skills, or bring your own idea and let collaborators help you make it real.
hero.stepsNeedHelp: {count, plural, one {# step needs help} other {# steps need help}}

entry.browseDesc: Filter by skill, location, time commitment. Find one that fits and join in.
entry.dashboardDesc: Pinned projects, next steps, and what's happening on the projects you've joined.
entry.signInDesc: Returning? Pick up where you left off. New here? Create an account in under a minute.
entry.signInDescSignedIn: You're signed in. Head to your dashboard to see your projects.

projects.title: New projects looking for you.
projects.subtitle: Just launched, and in need of their first contributors. Steps usually take less than 2 hours.

card.stepsNeedHelp: {count, plural, one {# step needs help} other {# steps need help}}

how.title: Contribute as much, or as little, as your time allows.
how.step1Desc: Add the things you're good at, and the ones you actually want to use on a project. A burnt-out developer doesn't have to do coding.
how.step2Desc: Browse whole projects, or just single steps. The smallest unit can be a 30-minute task, perfect for a quiet evening.
how.step3Desc: Join the team, claim a step, and ship something real with people who care about the same thing you do.

cta.title: Ready to act?
cta.subtitle: Browse what's live right now, or sign in to see your dashboard.
